title: prunus domestica var. italica
intro: Prunus domestica var. italica, also known as Italian plum, is a variety of plum tree (Prunus domestica) that originated in Italy. The bark, leaves, and fruit of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus domestica var. italica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, while the fruit is often eaten fresh or used in jams and preserves.
